subject: Fermi GBM trigger 681998863/220812505 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (USRA/NASA) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 681998863/220812505 at 12:07:38.16 UT on 12 August 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to particle activity.

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit the official Fermi GBM Support Page: https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/"
